name: GLOMERULOCYSTIC KIDNEY DISEASE
definition: GCKD = rare form of cystic renal disease characterized by cystic dilatation of Bowman

demographics.Genetics: often inherited autosomal-dominant disease in families with ADPKD / component of
demographics.Histo: uniform cystic dilatation of Bowman capsule around glomerulus

dominant_finding: cortical hyperechogenicity ← if cysts difficult to define
distribution: small round cysts in renal cortex
discriminating_features: small round cysts in renal cortex
cortical hyperechogenicity ← if cysts difficult to define
numerous T2-hyperintense lesions predominantly in subcapsular portion of renal cortex

US: small round cysts in renal cortex
cortical hyperechogenicity ← if cysts difficult to define
numerous T2-hyperintense lesions predominantly in subcapsular portion of renal cortex
